mapper.sql: SELECT p.participant_id, p.activity_id, p.lead_id, p.contact_id, p.company_name, p.contact_name, p.contact_phone, p.contact_email, p.position, p.participate_status, p.source, p.sign_time, p.sign_in_code, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.remark, a.activity_name FROM mk_activity_participant p LEFT JOIN mk_activity a ON p.activity_id = a.activity_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mk_activity_participant (activity_id, lead_id, contact_id, company_name, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, position, participate_status, source, sign_time, sign_in_code, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{activityId}, #{leadId}, #{contactId}, #{companyName}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{contactEmail}, #{position}, #{participateStatus}, #{source}, #{signTime}, #{signInCode}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM mk_activity_participant WHERE participant_id IN #{participantId}
mapper.select: WHERE p.activity_id = #{activityId} ORDER BY p.participant_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE mk_activity_participant SET lead_id = #{leadId}, update_time = sysdate() WHERE participant_id = #{participantId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mk_activity_participant WHERE activity_id = #{activityId}
